ogTitle: Tanjil Bren vs Tanjil South: Climate Safety

heading: Tanjil Bren vs Tanjil South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tanjil Bren, Victoria and Tanjil South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tanjil Bren has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Tanjil South (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tanjil Bren or Tanjil South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tanjil Bren has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Tanjil South scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tanjil Bren scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Tanjil South scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tanjil Bren or Tanjil South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tanjil Bren has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
